compiled_state.title: Reusable probe: full live ticket-system exercise (all commands + edge cases)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: A re-runnable smoke/integration probe that exercises every rebar CLI command and key edge cases against the real engine. Runs in an isolated tracker by default (safe to repeat; never mutates the project's real tickets), with strict cleanup. AC: covers all commands; asserts exit codes + invariants (incl. exit-10 concurrency, close guards, --help non-execution, show==list reducer parity); prints PASS/FAIL summary; non-zero exit on any failure.
